mapper.select: SELECT * FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER VALUES( SEQ_USER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{authority}, #{userId}, #{userPwd}, #{userName}, #{userAddress}, #{userPhone}, #{userEmail}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO MAIL_AUTH a USING DUAL ON (a.USER_EMAIL = #{email}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET AUTH_CODE = #{authCode}, CREATE_TIME = SYSDATE, EXPIRE_TIME = SYSDATE + 3/1440 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_EMAIL, AUTH_CODE, EXPIRE_TIME) VALUES (#{email}, #{authCode}, SYSDATE + 3/1440)
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_EMAIL, USER_PHONE, AUTHORITY FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND USER_DELETE_YN = 'N'
